title: Sunbox Vanilla Pack
description: Get a wonderful experience playing on SunboxMods Vanilla!
body:
![Sunbox Page Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bwzZmNs8/images/4c59c8b8dc47a2b4dd5d2acbfa9c7459360fa8f3.png)

**SunboxMods** is a unique modpack for playing on the minecraft server "SUNBOX". It includes mods designed specifically to optimize the game and improve gameplay.

One of the key features of this build are mods to optimize performance. They allow you to reduce the load on the client, improve performance and eliminate delays, which will allow you to enjoy the gameplay without problems.

Don't miss the chance to improve your gaming experience with Sunbox Download this modpack right now and enjoy playing on the SUNBOX server with new features and improved gameplay.
